Solo Pro Smart Bulb with JBL Bluetooth Speaker, App Controlled LED Light Dimmable Bulb, BR30, E26 Base, Compatible with Amazon Alexa

  • Unbelievable Sound in an Ultra Compact form: BR30 LED light bulb with a Hi-Fi JBL speaker delivers pure and powerful sound. Compared to other Bluetooth speaker bulbs on the market, Solo Pro will strengthen the bass of all music at any volume without distortions.
  • Rock Out to Music as You Shower:The Solo Pro is suitable for wet locations, perfectfor you to enjoy music in the bathroom.
  • Voice Control: This Sengled BR30 speaker bulb works with Amazon Alexa devices via a Bluetooth connection for audio control (but no light control). Just ask Alexa to assist you with controllingyour music playlist and free your hands.
  • Plug and Play: Enjoy a wirelessexperience. Just twist your bulb into an existing E26 light socket or fixture around your home, and you can enjoy Bluetooth controlled music and light from your mobile device.
  • Energy Saving: An LED lightbulb uses roughly 80% less energy than an equivalent 60 Watt incandescent bulb. With a lifetime of 25,000 hours, the bulb will last over 22.8 years (based on 3 hours of use each day) which saves you the cost of frequently replacing your bulbs.

Whether it's your bathroom, patio, or garage, solo Pro lets you stream your favorite music through a 1.75&Amp; Roque; high fidelity JBL speaker as easily as screwing in a light bulb. The 13W speaker Bulb delivers rich sound without requiring any wires, batteries, or remotes. Simply twisting in the solo Pro Bulb and connect to the Bluetooth on your smartphone or tablet to stream music. The solo Pro speaker Bulb fits into any standard 5" or 6" recessed cans as well as large lighting fixtures. Being IP43 damp rated, solo Pro is suitable for both indoor and covered outdoor spaces, so now you can bring music to any room. The LED is guaranteed for 25, 000 hours of operation so you won't have to worry about the light burning out. Adjust both lighting and volume with the free iOS or Android Sengled pulse app. Light and sound can be controlled independently so you can rock out to solo Pro day and night. Solo Pro has 6 preset EQ settings to customize the music experience. Sengled offers 1-year warranty.

ABOUT US

We’re dedicated to bringing you great deals on quality products. From home décor and garden essentials to tools, hardware, and pet accessories, our store has something for everyone — all at prices you’ll love.

SHIPPING

We ship all orders directly from the USA for fast, reliable delivery. Most items ship within 1 business day and include free shipping to the lower 48 states.

For international orders, we use eBay’s Global Shipping Program — simply continue checkout to see costs, duties, and taxes for your country.

FREE RETURNS

We offer a 30-Day Return Policy on items which you are not completely satisfied with. You have the option for a full-refund or an exchange of the item. 

CUSTOMER SATISFACTION

We do everything we can to ensure every customer is 100% satisfied. If something isn’t right, just send us a message — we’ll make it right quickly!

title: Alexa Light Bulb 130W Equivalent, Smart Light Bulb
shortDescription: Smart Light Bulb - 130W Equivalent. 12W power draw equivalent to 130W, emitting a brilliant 1300LM. Adjustable color temperature ranging from a warm 2700K to a bright 6000K for the perfect ambiance.
description:
Smart Light Bulb - 130W Equivalent

Illuminate your space with elegance and advanced technology with our Smart Light Bulb. Designed for discerning users who appreciate quality and convenience, this Bluetooth connected smart bulb blends seamlessly with your lifestyle.

Features:

  • Equipped with Bluetooth connectivity, compatible with Alexa speakers and BRmesh APP control.
  • 12W power draw equivalent to 130W, emitting a brilliant 1300LM.
  • Adjustable color temperature ranging from a warm 2700K to a bright 6000K for the perfect ambiance.
  • Exceptional color rendering index (CRI) > 90 ensures accurate color representation.
  • Fully dimmable with brightness levels adjustable from 1% to 100%.
  • No WiFi, registration, or hub needed for operation.
  • 40 lighting scenes available through the BRmesh APP for customized settings to suit your mood.

Benefits:

  • Easy one-step pairing process with Alexa — simply say 'find device' and enjoy seamless connectivity.
  • Advanced "PWM to Analog" technology prevents flickering, making it perfect for photography and reducing eye strain.
  • Auto interactions between lights using Bluetooth 5.0 chip enhance control without the restrictions of traditional setups.
  • Enjoy the convenience of timing functions, group control, and scene settings for a smart living experience.
  • Friendly design that allows deletion of the BRmesh APP after initial setup while continuing to work flawlessly with Alexa.

Why Choose Our Smart Light Bulb?

Transform your home into a sanctuary of light with our state-of-the-art Smart Light Bulb. Perfectly compatible with Alexa and designed with simplicity in mind, it’s the superior choice for those who value both aesthetics and functionality. With a myriad of features that enhance your lifestyle, this bulb is not just a source of light but an integral part of your home environment.

Elevate your lighting experience today and embrace the future of smart home technology. Order your Smart Light Bulbs now and take the first step towards a brighter, more beautiful home!

title: Energetic Light Bulbs Work with Alexa/Apple Home/Google Home/SmartThings, Matter
shortDescription: (Smart Speaker Required. Ensure that 2.4G WiFi and Bluetooth are turned on during pairing. If the QR code is unclear, use the 11-digit Matter code below it. Multicolor & Tunable White: The Energetic Matter smart bulb can explore a palette of 16,000,000 hues and fine-tune white tones ranging from a warm 2700K to a cold 6500K. ).
description:
• What is Matter: Matter is a standard protocol for smart home devices. The goal is to break down barriers and connect intelligent devices from various manufacturers and ecosystems. Say goodbye to platform constraints and the trouble of downloading several apps on your new devices. With Matter, you can truly integrate your smart devices and operate them all from a single Matter-certified app
  • Simple Setup and Use: Energetic Matter smart bulbs work effortlessly with the Alexa, Google Home, Apple Home, and SmartThings apps. Turn on, scan the Matter QR code, and enter your enhanced smart home. Use voice commands to simply control the lights and modify the brightness or hues. (Smart Speaker Required. Ensure that 2.4G WiFi and Bluetooth are turned on during pairing. If the QR code is unclear, use the 11-digit Matter code below it
  • Multicolor & Tunable White: The Energetic Matter smart bulb can explore a palette of 16,000,000 hues and fine-tune white tones ranging from a warm 2700K to a cold 6500K. Energetic Matter Wifi light bulbs allow you to customize the ambience by adjusting the brightness from 1% to 100%. Suitable for a variety of dynamic scenes, such as video gaming, family gatherings, celebrations, etc

Sylvania Smart Light Bulb, Bluetooth Mesh LED Bulb, Compatible with Alexa & Google Home, A19, 60W Equivalent, E26, RGBW Full Color & Adjustable White [2022 Model] (Pack of 1, 4 Count Total)

Description

Style Bluetooth (A19)
Light Type LED
Bulb Shape Size A19
Color Full Color
Special Feature Color Changing, Dimmable, Energy Efficient, Frosted, Full Spectrum
Wattage 9.5 watts
Size 4 Count (Pack of 1)

  • HANDS-FREE VOICE CONTROL - Tell Alexa to adjust your lights however you want them when you want them: Turn on/off, Change color, Dim/Brighten, Set Routines, Away Mode, and More.
  • SET THE MOOD - Turn on the light when your hands can't, schedule your flex space to adjust to your daily routine, wake up to gradually brighter light, cozy up & wind down in the evening with low, warm light, and more.
  • BLUETOOTH LOW ENERGY (BLE) MESH BULB-TO-BULB CONNECTIVITY - Connect hundreds of bulbs, extend your voice control ability beyond wifi dead zones, each Bluetooth bulb acts as its own hub beyond the Alexa Echo device.
  • SYLVANIA QUALITY GUARANTEE - 13+ year bulb lifetime, shatter-proof, easy to connect & stay connected, vibrant & accurate color rendering, 3-year product warranty. Dimmable via app or voice control with smart speaker. Not compatible with traditional wall dimmers. Do not install this device on a circuit with a dimmer switch.
  • Connectivity protocol: Bluetooth Mesh

ABOUT US

We offer the best prices around on high quality products. Our E-store includes media such as books, movies, music and games while offering electronics, toys, sporting apparel, clothing, tools, general home, garden items and more.

SHIPPING

We are always working hard to ensure your package arrives as soon as possible. Please understand that some factors like weather, high postal traffic, and the performance of shipping companies are outside of our control.

We offer free shipping to the lower 48 states and ship within 2 business days of payment, usually sooner. We do not accept P.O. Boxes. Please provide a physical address.

For shipping outside of the continental USA, we only use eBay's Global Shipping Program.The item is shipped to KY and then sent to the rest of the world. International customers are responsible for all duties and taxes. Continue to check out in order to calculate costs for shipping the item to your country. Messages regarding eBay's Global Shipping Program MUST be directed at eBay EXCLUSIVELY.

RETURNS

We offer a 30-Day Return Policy on items which you are not completely satisfied with. You have the option for a full-refund or an exchange of the item. No returns are available on items shipped outside of the USA.

Create your smart home with smart LED Bulbs: The C by GE and smart bulb works with Alexa and Google Home. This is the Bluetooth bulb that Google Home and Alexa users need for easy and seamless integration when paired with the smart devices
Modernize traditional device with smart bulbs: The A19 smart light bulb fits medium base sockets in open fixtures designed for traditional 60-Watt incandescent A19 bulbs and helps make your house a smart home
Perfect everyday light: Create a scene with optimal soft white light to match your style by installing the C by GE or smart light bulb. The smart light bulbs work with Alexa and Google Home to easily explore scenes that fit your mood

Sengled wireless speaker LED bulb shown. Integrated speaker and light in a silver-white finish. Easy plug-in design. Great for smart audio lighting setups.

Unbelievable Sound in an Ultra Compact form: BR30 LED light bulb with a Hi-Fi JBL speaker delivers pure and powerful sound. Compared to other Bluetooth speaker bulbs on the market, Solo Pro will strengthen the bass of all music at any volume without distortions.
Rock Out to Music as You Shower:The Solo Pro is suitable for wet locations, perfectfor you to enjoy music in the bathroom.
Voice Control: This Sengled BR30 speaker bulb works with Amazon Alexa devices via a Bluetooth connection for audio control (but no light control). Just ask Alexa to assist you with controllingyour music playlist and free your hands.
Plug and Play: Enjoy a wirelessexperience. Just twist your bulb into an existing E26 light socket or fixture around your home, and you can enjoy Bluetooth controlled music and light from your mobile device.

title: SYLVANIA Dimmable WiFi LED Smart Bulbs - 4 Pack, Soft White 60W Equivalent
shortDescription: Whether it’s the family room, office, or recreational area, set the perfect ambience with dimmable functionality. Soft White 60W Equivalent. Compatibility Is Key: Works exclusively with 2.4 GHz WiFi networks, designed for indoor use, and makes your lighting smart and secure.
description:
SYLVANIA Dimmable WiFi LED Smart Bulbs - 4 Pack, Soft White 60W Equivalent

Revolutionary Dimmable WiFi LED Smart Bulbs - 4 Pack

Soft White 60W Equivalent

Elevate Your Home Lighting Experience:

  • Hassle-Free Voice Control: Seamlessly integrates with Alexa, Siri Shortcuts, and Google Home. Just speak your command without the need for a hub!
  • Lighting for Better Living: Create and manage routines, alarms, and night-time schedules. Ensure your home remains lively and secure, even while you're on vacation.
  • Home, Reimagined: Effortlessly transform the vibe of any room. Whether it’s the family room, office, or recreational area, set the perfect ambience with dimmable functionality.
  • Soft White Glow: The 2700K color temperature ushers in a soothing atmosphere, ideal for relaxation and unwinding after a busy day.
  • Compatibility Is Key: Works exclusively with 2.4 GHz WiFi networks, designed for indoor use, and makes your lighting smart and secure.
  • Intuitive Control: Dimmable via the app or voice commands with smart speakers, but not compatible with traditional wall dimmers.

Why Choose Our Smart Bulbs?

Rethink the way you illuminate your spaces with these advanced smart LED bulbs. Designed for the modern home, they offer reliability, ease of use, and the power to control your environment with just your voice. Transform any room into a relaxing sanctuary or an energetic space with the simple touch of a button or a voice command.

Embrace the future of home lighting. Order your pack of Dimmable WiFi LED Smart Bulbs today and take the first step towards a smarter, more inviting home!

    • Free & Fast Shipping - We offer free shipping to most of the USA with a normal delivery time of 3-7 days. However, due to the current situation, additional delivery time (up to 3 weeks) may be required for some items.
    • Alternative Carriers - We may use alternative carriers (e.g. USPS, FedEx, UPS, etc.) to ensure your package arrives safely and on time. Due to the use of multiple carriers, we are unable to provide a tracking number automatically.
    • Handling Time - Orders are processed and shipped within 1-2 business days of receiving cleared payment.
    • Shipping Restrictions - Shipping to Alaska, Hawaii, Puerto Rico, Guam, and other US territories may incur shipping charges or delivery restrictions. Please contact us before ordering, or your order can be refunded/cancelled.
    • State Restrictions - There may be restrictions based on your state of purchase. For example, certain items may not be shipped to California due to state regulations.
    • Contact for Tracking Updates - If you require tracking updates or have any concerns about the delivery of your order, please feel free to contact us, and we will be happy to assist you.

    • 30-Day Hassle-Free Returns - We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you are not, you can return the item within 30 days of receiving it for a full refund or exchange.
    • Easy Return Process - To start a return, simply contact us and we will provide you with a prepaid return shipping label and detailed instructions.
    • Restocking Fee - There are no restocking fees for returns. However, the buyer is responsible for return shipping costs if the return is not due to a seller's error.
    • Refund Processing Time - Refunds will be processed within 5 business days of receiving the returned item in its condition.

We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and Apple Pay for your convenience. Your payment information is secure and encrypted to ensure a safe and seamless transaction. Please complete your payment within 3 days of purchase to avoid any delays in shipping.

Your feedback is extremely important to us. We strive to provide the best products and customer service possible. If you are satisfied with your purchase, please take a moment to leave us a positive review. If you have any concerns or issues with your order, please contact us before leaving negative feedback. We are committed to resolving any problems and ensuring your satisfaction.




If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to out to our customer support team. You can contact us through the eBay messaging system. We are available Monday to Friday, 9:00 am to 5:00 pm EST, and we will do our best to respond to your inquiry within 24 hours.



Buy it now and enjoy a pleasant shopping experience!
